description_long: This is a large, U-shaped sectional sofa with a modern, minimalist design, featuring a combination of deep red and beige upholstery. The sofa is composed of three main seating sections joined at right angles, creating a spacious seating area suitable for communal or public spaces. The seat and back cushions are uniform in size and appear to be firmly attached, providing a clean, streamlined look. Two dark gray throw pillows are placed at the ends of the sofa, adding a touch of contrast and comfort. The base of the sofa is slightly elevated on short, block-style legs, and the armrests are low and squared, integrated seamlessly into the end sections. The upholstery is smooth and solid-colored, with no visible decorative stitching or tufting, emphasizing a contemporary aesthetic.
description: A large, U-shaped modern sectional sofa with red and beige upholstery, low square armrests, and two gray throw pillows. The design is sleek, with smooth, uniform cushions and a minimalist appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full U-shape, red seat and back cushions, beige base, and two gray pillows at each end.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sofa's depth, the thickness of the cushions, and the low, squared armrest at the end.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the sofa's overall length, with the armrests and pillows visible at the far ends.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the sofa's depth, cushion thickness, and the other end's armrest and pillow.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Multiple individual seat and back cushions, all uniform in size, attached and arranged in a continuous U-shaped sectional layout; two loose gray throw pillows at the ends.
attribute_armrest_style: Low, squared armrests integrated into the end sections, matching the height of the seat back, with a straight, minimalist profile and no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Short, block-style legs positioned at the corners and possibly at central support points, minimally visible, likely made of wood or metal, with a recessed appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, straight backrest of medium height, segmented to match the seat cushions, with no visible tufting or decorative features; cushions appear attached.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color upholstery with a smooth texture, no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching; clean and modern finish.
